title: Python For Loops
simple: A loop repeats steps. This is useful when the same work must run many times.
advanced: A for loop iterates over an iterable. range(start, stop) creates a sequence used for deterministic iteration.
explanation: This lesson introduces repetition and sequence-based iteration.
lineExplanations: Line 1: Create a loop where i goes from 1 to 5.
Line 2: Print i in each loop round.
